title: Faith Satrya
text:
Hi there!
My name is Faith Satrya, I am currently a senior at UCLA pursuing my undergraduate degree in Statistics and Data Science. My studies have enhanced my interest in being able to perform data analyses in many different contexts to inform solutions. I currently work part-time as a tennis instructor, specialising in teaching children between the ages of 5-14. While incredibly passionate about this job, I am currently looking for full-time employment in a field where I can apply the skills I obtained during my time at UCLA.
